name: 3pc Luxe Coordinate Bath Bundle Set - Threshold™: Elegant Glass Ensemble with Tumbler, Dish
description:
Add luxurious style to your bath space with the 3-Piece Luxe Coordinate Bath Bundle Set from Threshold™. This bath bundle set includes a soap dish, soap dispenser and bath tumbler to meet your everyday needs. All the pieces are crafted from glass and feature an irregular molded design for extra visual appeal that suits all your bathroom settings. Plus, the pieces feature a gold-dipped like base for a stunning look you'll love.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
